title: April 19th, 2022
body:
lyrics

it's not important whether i'm better than you

so telling you it's true or not is something i never can do

or want

i better or what

you forget i'm a veteran

grunt when i settle in

trenches are for settlin scores

i score when i get it in so i'm puttin up shots

more when i'm feeling it

off when i'm dealin with y'all too much



#quick capture

i osmose cosmos and y'all won't watch if i don't aim and calibrate all the scopes cuz ol folks called us dopes who need to be told where the remote controls do and don't go and whenever we didn't listen they fall broke
